about.approach.1.d: Directly employed, certified trades — not subcontracted labour chains.
about.approach.2.d: Permit-to-work discipline and a zero-incident operating target.
about.approach.3.d: One responsible team from enquiry to handback.
about.approach.4.d: Traceable procedures and complete handover packs.
about.approach.5.d: Realistic planning and predictable handback dates.
about.approach.6.d: Years of work inside refineries and chemical plants.
about.approach.intro: The principles that make us approvable on operating sites.
about.cta.h2: Work with a contractor built to execute
about.header.h1: An industrial contractor built on execution
about.header.lead: Balkos Montage delivers industrial projects with its own qualified workforce — from pipeline construction to shutdown execution inside demanding process facilities.
about.mission.statement: To execute industrial work safely and reliably inside our clients' facilities, with our own qualified specialists and a single point of accountability.
about.overview.p1: What began with industrial personnel support has grown into a full project-execution contractor. Today our core business is pipeline construction, industrial maintenance, shutdown services and project delivery — executed by people on our own payroll.
about.overview.p2: Personnel leasing remains available as a supporting service, but our identity is now defined by what we build and maintain inside our clients' facilities.
about.vision.statement: To be the contractor industrial operators trust first for maintenance, pipeline and turnaround work across the process industries.
careers.form.msgPh: Tell us about your experience and certifications.
careers.form.name: Full name *
careers.header.lead: Skilled industrial trades for project execution across refineries, chemical and petrochemical plants. This is the careers track — separate from project enquiries.
careers.job1.title: Welder (MAG / TIG)
careers.job2.title: Pipefitter
careers.job3.title: Industrial Mechanic
careers.job4.title: Maintenance Technician
careers.ok.body: Your application has been logged. Our team will review your qualifications and be in touch if there is a match.
careers.roles.note: We employ our trades directly and invest in certification, equipment and ongoing safety training.
clients.cta.sub: Request references for your sector and a pre-qualification package as part of your enquiry.
clients.header.h1: Trusted to work inside operating facilities
clients.header.lead: Being repeatedly approved onto live industrial sites is the strongest trust signal an industrial contractor can hold. Our clients return because work is delivered safely, to specification and to schedule.
clients.industries.note: References for a specific sector or facility type can be provided as part of a pre-qualification package.
clients.logos.note: Client names and marks shown on request, subject to confidentiality agreements.
clients.t1.quote: "Their crews integrate into our permit-to-work system without friction. Scopes are delivered on time and the documentation is always in order."
clients.t2.quote: "During our last turnaround Balkos mobilised quickly and held the critical path. We have kept them on framework ever since."
compliance.docs.note: Full pre-qualification packages available on request via the contact form.
compliance.header.lead: Externally audited management systems and qualified procedures — the documentation procurement and HSE departments need for pre-qualification.
compliance.quality.lead: Traceable quality control from material receipt to final handover documentation.
compliance.safety.lead: Every scope is executed under a documented safety regime aligned to client site rules.
contact.f.name: Full name *
contact.header.lead: Tell us about your project and we will respond with a realistic proposal — typically within 48 hours.
contact.ok.body: Your enquiry has been logged. A member of our project team will respond, typically within 48 hours.
contact.ok.h3: Thank you — we'll be in touch
contact.ph.desc: Scope, location, timeframe and any specific requirements.
contact.ph.name: Your name
footer.about: Industrial project execution, pipeline construction, maintenance and shutdown services for the chemical, petrochemical, refinery and foundry sectors — delivered with our own qualified workforce.
footer.cta.sub: Technical enquiry, site assessment and a realistic proposal — typically within 48 hours.
footer.cta.title: Discuss your scope with our project team
home.careers.h2: Skilled trades — join our site teams
home.careers.sub: Welders, pipefitters, industrial mechanics and maintenance technicians. A separate track from project enquiries.
home.cert.lead: Our management systems and site procedures are externally audited and aligned to the standards expected on hazardous industrial sites.
home.clients.lead: We are repeatedly approved to work inside live chemical, petrochemical and refinery facilities — the strongest signal of operational trust an industrial contractor can hold.
home.final.sub: Tell us about your project and we will respond with a realistic proposal.
home.hero.h1: Industrial Projects Executed by Qualified Specialists
home.hero.lead: Pipeline construction, industrial maintenance, shutdown services and project execution for refineries, chemical plants, petrochemical facilities and foundries.
home.ind.chemical: Maintenance and construction in active process environments with strict permit-to-work regimes.
home.ind.energy: Plant maintenance and pipework for power and energy generation sites.
home.ind.foundries: Maintenance and construction work for foundry plant and material-handling systems.
home.ind.manufacturing: Mechanical installation and upkeep across heavy manufacturing operations.
home.ind.petro: Piping, equipment and structural work in high-hazard petrochemical facilities.
home.ind.refineries: Turnaround and routine maintenance scopes executed to refinery safety standards.
home.services.c1: Prefabrication, on-site installation, welding and testing of process piping and pipeline systems to industrial code.
home.services.c2: Preventive and corrective maintenance of process equipment, keeping plants safe, compliant and in continuous operation.
home.services.c3: Planned turnaround execution under tight schedules — mobilised crews, sequenced scopes and predictable handback.
home.services.c4: Qualified welders, pipefitters and mechanics to reinforce your teams when project demand peaks.
home.services.intro: Project execution delivered with our own workforce. Personnel leasing remains available as a supporting service.
home.trust.label: Core Capabilities
home.why.1.d: Certified welders, pipefitters and mechanics on our own payroll.
home.why.2.d: Scopes delivered to plan, to schedule and to specification.
home.why.3.d: Two decades inside refineries, chemical and petrochemical plants.
home.why.4.d: Permit-to-work discipline and a zero-incident operating target.
home.why.5.d: Single point of accountability from enquiry to handback.
home.why.h2: Built to execute inside your facility

industries.cta.sub: Tell us about your facility and scope — we will respond with a realistic proposal.
industries.header.lead: We execute work in the most demanding industrial environments, where safety regimes, permits and uptime requirements leave no margin for error.
industries.intro.body: Whether inside a refinery turnaround or a foundry maintenance scope, the same discipline applies: qualified people, permit-to-work compliance and a single point of accountability.
industries.intro.h2: One operating standard across every facility type
industries.row.chemical.desc: Maintenance and construction inside active chemical process plants, working under strict permit-to-work and hazardous-area regimes.
industries.row.energy.desc: Plant maintenance and pipework for power and energy generation sites, delivered to the same safety and quality standards.
industries.row.foundries.desc: Maintenance and construction work for foundry plant, material-handling systems and high-temperature process equipment.
industries.row.manufacturing.desc: Mechanical installation and upkeep across heavy manufacturing operations, supporting continuous production lines.
industries.row.petro.desc: Piping, equipment and structural work in high-hazard petrochemical facilities where execution quality is non-negotiable.
industries.row.refineries.desc: Turnaround and routine maintenance scopes executed to refinery safety standards, with crews experienced in live-plant conditions.
proj.p1.outcome: Handed back on schedule, zero LTI
proj.p1.title: Crude Unit Turnaround Support
proj.p2.scope: Prefab & install of stainless process lines
proj.p2.title: Process Pipeline Installation
proj.p3.title: Plant Maintenance Framework

proj.p5.title: Column Replacement & Access
proj.p6.title: Foundry Conveying Maintenance
proj.p7.title: Energy Plant Outage Pipework
proj.p8.title: Manufacturing Line Mechanical Install
projects.header.lead: Representative scopes delivered across refineries, chemical and petrochemical plants, foundries and manufacturing sites.
services.header.h1: Industrial services delivered with our own workforce
services.header.lead: From prefabrication to turnaround execution — four service lines covering the full scope of work inside process facilities.
services.s01.overview: Prefabrication and on-site installation of process piping and pipeline systems. Our welding teams work to qualified procedures with full traceability and NDT support.
services.s01.step1.d: Isometrics, material take-off and weld map.
services.s01.title: Pipeline Construction & Fabrication
services.s02.overview: Preventive and corrective maintenance of static and rotating equipment, keeping plants safe, compliant and in continuous operation throughout the asset lifecycle.
services.s02.title: Industrial Maintenance
services.s03.overview: Planned turnarounds executed under compressed schedules. We mobilise sequenced crews, manage interfaces and deliver predictable handback to operations.
services.s03.title: Shutdown & Turnaround
services.s04.overview: When project demand peaks, we second qualified welders, pipefitters and industrial mechanics to reinforce your own teams — the same trades that execute our projects, available on a temporary basis.
services.s04.title: Personnel Leasing
util.tagline: Industrial Project Execution  ·  Refineries  ·  Chemical  ·  Petrochemical  ·  Foundries
